landing.tagline: Your gateway to next-generation architecture. Seamlessly fused for maximum velocity.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.desc: Powered by Vite and FastAPI for incredible speed.

secure.title: Secure Auth
secure.desc: JWT-based authentication with OAuth support built-in.

modern.title: Modern UI
modern.desc: Sleek glassmorphism design system ready to go.

auth.login_subtitle: Resume your session. Enter the stream.
auth.register_subtitle: Join the next generation. Build your future.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Secure your account again. Choose a new key.
auth.reset_success: Password reset successful. Redirecting to login...
auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Lost your key? Initiate recovery protocol.
auth.recovery_sent: We have sent a password recovery instruction to
auth.recovery_helper: We'll send you a link to reset your password.

seo.login_desc: Secure login access to the FASMO architecture.
seo.verify_desc: Verify your email address for FASMO.

verify_email.title: Email Verification
verify_email.verified_subtitle:
Connection established. 
You're in the system.
verify_email.status_verifying_desc: Please wait while we confirm your identity...
verify_email.status_success_desc: Your email has been successfully verified. You now have full access to FASMO.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your account and API access.
dashboard.revoke_warning: All applications using this key will stop working instantly.
dashboard.management_desc: Securely manage your frequency access keys
dashboard.logs_desc: View your recent API key activities and authentication logs.
dashboard.logs_coming_soon: Activity logs will be available soon.
dashboard.hover_to_view: Hover to view key. Keep it secret.
dashboard.no_key_desc: You don't have an active frequency key. Generate one to start transmission.
dashboard.docs_desc: Learn how to integrate FASMO into your own applications using our comprehensive API guide.
dashboard.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to sever the connection? This action cannot be undone and will immediately invalidate all existing connections.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.subtitle: We couldn't find the page you're looking for.
404.description: The link might be broken, or the page has been moved.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.subtitle: Something went wrong on our end.
500.description: Our systems are experiencing issues. Please try again later.

403.title: Access Denied
403.subtitle: You don't have permission to access this page.
403.description: Please contact the administrator if you believe this is an error.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.subtitle: Authentication is required.
401.description: Please log in to access this resource.

default.title: Something Went Wrong
default.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred.
default.description: Please try again later or contact support.

offline.title: You Are Offline
offline.description: Your internet connection was lost. Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile data network, then try again.
